action.reasoning: Observation: AugReg training found 0 valid files because paths in train.txt (e.g., 'clipart/aircraft_carrier/clipart_001_000018.jpg') need 'images/' prefix - actual files are at '/data/images/clipart/...'. The file existence check was using wrong path. Also the script was truncated at the end. Analysis: Root cause is missing 'images/' directory component in path construction. Need to fix path to os.path.join(root, 'images', path) and remove the slow file existence check (just use try/except in __getitem__). Decision: Write complete, fixed train_augreg.py and train AugReg ViT-B/16 for 8 epochs with SWAD, then ensemble with CLIP in next iteration.
action.command: ls /data/images/ | head -5 && python -c "from PIL import Image; img=Image.open('/data/images/clipart/aircraft_carrier/clipart_001_000018.jpg'); print('OK', img.size)" && python train_augreg.py
